verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The sheep of His Pasteur have gathered To hear what the shepherd would say, His voice like the sound of slow waters, Came rippling through vessels of clay.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Tis the voice that brought forth creation And set all the stars in array, And speaks Words of life and of wisdom, In the midst of His people today.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through prophets, by precious blood purchased, Cleansed and surrendered and filled. And set in the body for service, As the Head of the body hath willed.
